title: Artefact
description: Any durable output PRODUCED by an Invocation or SERVES an Intent — file, amendment-proposal, command-template, published-skill, or any capability-specific output. The 'kind' field discriminates sub-types (agency/ontology.py; agency/_invoke.py).

path.description: Filesystem path — present when kind='file' or kind='amendment-proposal'.

name.description: Human-readable label — present on command-templates and published-skills.
